subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mindful and reflective! Cast aside all thoughts and abandon all remembrance, and turn thee toward the resplendent lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المتذکر المتفکر دع الافکار و اترک الاذکار و توجه الی الانوار الساطع
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
